settings.heading: OUR CANCELLATION POLICY
settings.content:
If you would like to cancel your order, please email 

orders@shoplittledesignco.com 

within 24 hours of placing your order. We do not accept cancellations after this 24 hour period.

settings.heading: OUR EXCHANGE POLICY
settings.content:
Exchanges are always welcome within 5 days of receipt. If you choose to exchange a product, item(s) must be returned in their original packaging, otherwise we will be unable to accept the exchange.

 

To exchange please send an email to 

returns@shoplittledesignco.com 

and include the following information:

 

Reason for exchange

Order number

Date ordered

Date received

Items you would like to exchange for

 

 

Important Notes:

 

• Please note that Little Design Co. is not responsible to pay for return shipping arrangements.

• Exchange merchandise must be in new condition, and subject to inspection by Little Design Co.

• We have the right to refuse a return/exchange in situations deemed necessary.

• Please note that your order can only be processed for an exchange one time. Once you have received your exchange items they are non-returnable.

• Colors may vary from how they appear on your screen. We highly recommend ordering a sample prior to purchasing to avoid exchanges and potential restocking fees.

• If your order is at all customized, no exchanges or returns will be accepted under any circumstances. For example : custom size , custom detail, etc.

settings.heading: OUR RETURN POLICY
settings.content:
All items, are made to order, as fabric is on hand. Therefore, items are non-returnable unless there is a defect. Please contact us if there is a problem with any product that you receive within 2-3 days of receipt. If you are returning, item(s) MUST be returned in its original packaging, otherwise you will not be refunded.

In order to return an item please send an email to 

returns@shoplittledesignco.com 

and include the following information :

Order number
Date ordered
Date received
Image of defect
Reason for return

Important Notes:

• All products that leave our studio undergo a detailed quality control inspection and are approved for shipping.

• If your order is at all customized, no exchanges or returns will be accepted under any circumstances. For example : custom size , custom detail, etc.
